name: Archetype Spells Pack II
author: Emberveil
description: Ten additional archetype spells (M151) continuing the DSL-authored catalog from archetype-spells.json. Covers mutual revive, auto-revive, idle ramp, stacking armor shred, companion sacrifice, multi-round rituals, phase, guard-link redirect, overheal-to-barrier, and counter-magic. All authored purely in the v1 Effect DSL — two items (Conditional multi, Dash back-row strike) are shelved with explicit reasons because the DSL has no dynamic-target-count or row-targeting primitive yet; see /assets/wishlist.html.

skills.name: Soul Tether
skills.description: Bind caster and one ally. If either drops to 0 HP, an onEvent('onDeath') hook resurrects the other at 25% maxHp via a single heal pulse. Tether lasts 4 rounds.

skills.name: Second Wind
skills.description: Self-buff: the next fatal blow is converted into a 1-HP survival pulse. onEvent('onDeath') triggers a flat heal and consumes the buff.

skills.name: Channel Ramp
skills.description: Self-buff that grows +25% power per round of not attacking (tracked via incrementFlag('idleRounds')). On next attack (onHit), consumes the ramp and adds a damage echo scaled by accumulated idle rounds.

skills.name: Armor Shred
skills.description: Dex-scaling strike that stacks an armor-reduction debuff. statusModel.addStatus already coalesces stacks across casts (statuses[].stacks += 1), so repeat casts accumulate -armor.

skills.name: Sacrifice Companion
skills.description: Slays a willing ally (full-HP damage to the target ally) and converts that life into a major int buff + heal for the caster. Uses damage+heal+buff only — no removeFromCombat op needed; the ally's onDeath hook handles cleanup elsewhere.

skills.name: Doom Ritual
skills.description: A 3-round ritual. While channeling the caster applies 'channeling' status (interruptible — removable by stun/silence per statusModel). On completion, deals massive int damage to all enemies and applies doom.

skills.name: Phase Shift
skills.description: Caster becomes untargetable for 1 round and cannot act (setFlag skipTurn). Combat runtime checks the 'untargetable' status when selecting AI targets and the skipTurn flag when resolving the caster's next turn.

skills.name: Guard Link
skills.description: Applies 'redirect_to_caster' status on an ally for 1 round. Combat runtime (pending migration, tracked on wishlist alongside Soulbind) should route damage targeted at the ally to the caster while this status is active.

skills.name: Radiant Font
skills.description: Heals an ally for a large amount, deliberately overshooting max HP. statusModel.overhealToBarrier() converts the overflow into a 3-round 'barrier' status with barrierHp matching the overflow.

skills.name: Counter-Magic Screen
skills.description: Applies 'magic_reflect' to all allies for 1 round. On each incoming magical hit, onEvent('onSpellHit') returns 100% int damage to the caster of the incoming spell. Mirrors the arch_active_reflect pattern but party-wide and magic-only.
